# The Empowered Sensitive
> Evidence-Based Guidance for Highly Sensitive People

## About
The Empowered Sensitive publishes 300 research-backed articles exploring sensory processing sensitivity across five dimensions: The Science, The Nervous System, The World, The Gift, and The Practice. Each article integrates neuroscience research, lived experience, and practical application.

## Author
Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer
Website: https://kalesh.love

## Categories
- [The Science](/the-science): Neuroscience, genetics, and research behind sensory processing sensitivity (60 articles)
- [The Nervous System](/the-nervous-system): Understanding and regulating the HSP autonomic nervous system (60 articles)
- [The World](/the-world): Navigating relationships, work, and daily life as a highly sensitive person (60 articles)
- [The Gift](/the-gift): The unique capacities, creativity, and depth that sensitivity brings (60 articles)
- [The Practice](/the-practice): Practical tools, routines, and embodiment practices for HSPs (60 articles)

## Key Researchers Referenced
- Dr. Elaine Aron (sensory processing sensitivity)
- Dr. Bianca Acevedo (HSP neuroimaging)
- Dr. Michael Pluess (vantage sensitivity)
- Dr. Stephen Porges (polyvagal theory)
- Dr. Dario Nardi (neuroscience of personality)
- Dr. Jadzia Jagiellowicz (HSP cognition)
- Dr. Arthur Aron (close relationships)

## Content Standards
All articles meet Gold Standard requirements: named researchers with specific findings, lived experience integration, practical application, 2500+ words, FAQ sections, and internal cross-linking.

## URLs
- Homepage: https://sensitive.love
- About: https://sensitive.love/about
- Sitemap: https://sensitive.love/sitemap
